---
name: Feature request
about: Request a new template, page, or site feature
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or content you want added.

## Rationale

Why is this valuable? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

High-level approach or example content.

## Acceptance criteria

- What must be true for this to be considered done?

## Additional notes

Related pages, diagrams or stakeholders.
